description: Diminuative Minnie-May Hopkins was working as an under-age prostitute at a brothel in Chicago's China Town before her iron resolve, talent with explosives, and great demeanor with the customers at the Gunsmith Cat Gunshop caused Rally Vincent to hire her as her assistant. May can hide armed explosives in just about anything, and is therefore equally expert at finding and disarming bombs placed by others. name: Mito Freecss
description: Mito Freecss is Gon's adopted mother, and cousin to Ging Freecss. In the manga, Mito did not want Gon to become a Hunter because Ging only came back home once after he took the Hunter's exam. She did not want Gon to leave his family like Ging did. In the manga and in the 2011 anime, Ging is Mito's cousin. However in the original anime and novelization, Mito was made into the sister of Gon's mother, making Ging her brother-in-law.

name: Mitsuyoshi Tada
description: He is in his second year at the Ginga University Affiliated Koinohoshi High School. He wants to become a photographer just like his late father, and is working at Tada Coffee Shop, which is run by his grandfather. He is a part of the photography club at school, and his specialty is atmospheric pictures. He doesn't talk much, but he is a kind boy who works very hard and cares for his friends. Those around him sometimes envy him, because he is always himself and very attentive to his surroundings.

name: Neia Baraja
description: Neia Baraja is a Squire serving in the Holy Kingdom Liberation Army and the daughter of Pavel Baraja. While initially a low-ranking member of the Paladin Order, she became recognized as a hero after playing a vital role in the liberation of the Northern Holy Kingdom. Neia is a woman with short blonde hair and beady black eyes slanted upwards, giving the impression that she was constantly glaring at others. name: Solid Snake
description: Solid Snake, born as David, is one of the four main protagonists of the Metal Gear series, appearing as the main protagonist of Metal Gear, Metal Gear 2: Solid Snake, and Metal Gear Solid, the deuteragonist of Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty, and the main protagonist of Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots. Solid Snake was a former spy, special operations soldier and mercenary, and a clone of Big Boss, the most legendary warrior of the twentieth century.

name: Yuzu
description: __Height:__ 130 cm The protagonist of the story. An innocent and hardworking country fox. She was brought up by Bikuni, and has a rather extensive knowledge of things.

name: Akuraou
description: Akura-ou is a powerful demon with an immortal body, only considering Tomoe to be his equal. However when Tomoe left him, he succumbed to the gods powers and lost his body. After being locked up, he was given a chance to live in a boy's body and took it, returning to the world and is constantly seeking a way to retrieve his lost body.

name: Fuyumi Yanagi
description: The human high-school-aged girl who becomes lost in the Demon World through unknown methods and for unknown reasons. She becomes a ghost after being eaten by a carnivorous plant. The triangle headband she dawns is a symbol of this. Yanagi is from Japan, and because of this, Staz is even more interested in her, often asking about anime and manga from the human world. She wishes to be resurrected as a human, and to help Staz achieve that goal.
